channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: US strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean
item.description: The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in early September.
item.content:encoded:
The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in early September.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Mexico becomes first country to reach knockout stage of World Cup
item.description: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the World Cup.

(Image credit: Ricardo Mazalan)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Luigi Mangione's lawyers withdraw plans for psychiatric defense
item.description: In a court filing Thursday, Mangione's legal team said they won't file psychiatric evidence in the 28-year-old's state murder case. The move came a day after his lawyers said they planned to pursue a psychiatric defense.
item.content:encoded:
In a court filing Thursday, Mangione's legal team said they won't file psychiatric evidence in the 28-year-old's state murder case. The move came a day after his lawyers said they planned to pursue a psychiatric defense.

(Image credit: Angelina Katsanis)
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: Key FDA committee unanimously recommends its first vaccine since 2023
item.description: All nine members of the committee unanimously voted to recommend Moderna's new mRNA influenza vaccine for adults 50 and over.
item.content:encoded:
All nine members of the committee unanimously voted to recommend Moderna's new mRNA influenza vaccine for adults 50 and over.

(Image credit: Visoot Uthairam/Moment RF)
item.dc:creator: Joseph Kim

item.title: In photos: The Knicks celebrate their first NBA championship in more than 50 years
item.description: The New York Knicks celebrate their NBA championship win with a ticker tape parade in Manhattan.
item.content:encoded:
The New York Knicks celebrate their NBA championship win with a ticker tape parade in Manhattan.

(Image credit: Elias Wlliams for NPR)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: U.S. lifts blockade on Iranian ports as 60-day clock for a final deal starts ticking
item.description: The U.S. is allowing ships to enter and exit Iranian ports and coastal areas as the countries move to a new phase of negotiations over the next 60 days.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. is allowing ships to enter and exit Iranian ports and coastal areas as the countries move to a new phase of negotiations over the next 60 days.

(Image credit: Amirhossein Khorgooei)
item.dc:creator: NPR Politics and Policy Desk

item.title: Student loan borrowers will get an interest rate cut if they sign up for auto pay
item.description: The Trump administration wants to jumpstart student loan repayment, with federal student loan debt approaching $2 trillion.
item.content:encoded:
The Trump administration wants to jumpstart student loan repayment, with federal student loan debt approaching $2 trillion.

(Image credit: Daniel de la Hoz)
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner

item.title: Read the full text of Trump's preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement to end the war
item.description: Here is the text of the memorandum of understanding that was signed Wednesday by President Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, as well as Pakistan's prime minister.
item.content:encoded:
Here is the text of the memorandum of understanding that was signed Wednesday by President Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, as well as Pakistan's prime minister.

(Image credit: Nathan Laine)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Ukraine hits a Moscow oil refinery and other sites in a large-scale drone attack
item.description: Ukraine launched a wave of drone attacks on Russia early Thursday — one of the largest attacks on Russia's capital since the Kremlin ordered the invasion of Ukraine more than four years ago.
item.content:encoded:
Ukraine launched a wave of drone attacks on Russia early Thursday — one of the largest attacks on Russia's capital since the Kremlin ordered the invasion of Ukraine more than four years ago.

(Image credit: AFP)
item.dc:creator: Charles Maynes

item.title: You're probably using too many skin care products. Here are the 3 essentials
item.description: We asked half a dozen skin care experts: Which products do you really need to keep your skin healthy and attractive? Here's what they said.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

We asked half a dozen skin care experts: Which products do you really need to keep your skin healthy and attractive? Here's what they said.
item.dc:creator: Kelle Walsh
